mapper.select: SELECT u.user_name AS userName, t.task_id AS taskId, t.assignee_id AS assigneeId, t.task_name AS taskName, t.task_detail AS taskDetail, t.start_date AS startDate, t.due_date AS dueDate, t.completed_date AS completedDate, t.progress, t.memo FROM users u INNER JOIN tasks t ON u.login_id = t.assignee_id WHERE t.assignee_id = #{loginId} ORDER BY t.due_date ASC, t.progress DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT u.user_name AS userName, t.task_id AS taskId, t.assignee_id AS assigneeId, t.task_name AS taskName, t.task_detail AS taskDetail, t.start_date AS startDate, t.due_date AS dueDate, t.completed_date AS completedDate, t.progress, t.memo FROM users u INNER JOIN tasks t ON u.login_id = t.assignee_id ORDER BY t.due_date ASC, t.progress DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
